slides.title: DALP Platform Screenshots
slides.body: Digital Asset Lifecycle Platform UI Walkthrough

slides.title: Login
slides.body: Platform entry point with enterprise authentication.

slides.title: Login Screen
slides.body: Sign-in with email/password or passwordless passkey. Branded gradient background with SettleMint logo. Multi-factor authentication for enterprise security.

slides.title: Dashboard
slides.body: Real-time portfolio command center with live blockchain activity.

slides.title: Dashboard Overview
slides.body: Portfolio valuation ($276M), AUM (13.2B USD), pending action alerts, and live blockchain activity feed. Real-time command center for asset managers.

slides.title: Dashboard Identity Modules
slides.body: Identity Manager and Verification Policy Manager integrated into the dashboard. Pending KYC/AML alerts surface compliance actions without leaving the main workspace.

slides.title: Dashboard Verification Scale
slides.body: 39 on-chain identities, 4 trusted issuers, 384 active compliance verifications. Geographic asset distribution map previews cross-border holdings.

slides.title: Dashboard Jurisdiction Map
slides.body: Choropleth world map showing asset distribution by country. Darker shading indicates higher asset concentration — multi-jurisdiction compliance at a glance.

slides.title: Dashboard Asset Analytics
slides.body: Asset-level analytics: geographic map (Doha, Qatar) plus token supply history, mint/burn activity, transaction volume, and wallet distribution over 30 days.

slides.title: Dashboard Map Statistics
slides.body: Alternative analytics view: Doha property pin with token supply and holder distribution metrics. Supports decision-making for real estate asset managers.

slides.title: Asset Designer
slides.body: Guided wizard for tokenizing any asset class from design to deployment.

slides.title: Asset Designer Choose Class
slides.body: Step 1 of 7: select from Fixed Income (Bond), Flexible Income (Fund, Equity), Cash Equivalent (Stablecoin, Deposit), or Real World Asset (Precious Metal, Real Estate).

slides.title: Design Bond Asset Type
slides.body: Bond selected with built-in capability checklist: access control, supply limit, safe custody, cash out, earn returns. Feature scope confirmed before configuration.

slides.title: Design Bond Basic Info
slides.body: Real-time name/symbol/decimals availability check. Jurisdiction (France) assigned at creation. Token parameters: name, symbol, 18 decimals configured with live validation.

slides.title: Design Bond Instrument Details
slides.body: Bond-specific fields: ISIN (US0378331005, 12-char validated) and maturity date with time precision. Financial instrument standards captured at creation.

slides.title: Design Bond Denomination Setup
slides.body: Token supply cap (100,000 GOLBON) and denomination asset linking. Bonds linked to on-chain settlement tokens. Enter manually option supports direct address input.

slides.title: Design Bond Deutsche Bank
slides.body: Denomination: Deutsche Bank Euro Deposit (DEED). Face value 1,000 DEED per bond. Enables atomic DvP settlement against real institutional deposit tokens.

slides.title: Real Estate Asset Info
slides.body: Doha Business Towers (DBT) with Qatar jurisdiction, 4 decimal places for fractional ownership. Real-time name/symbol validation confirms token availability.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 3 - Real Estate Info.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Instrument Details
slides.body: Property metadata: REN123456789876, GPS (25.286106, 51.534817), Industrial type, Doha district code, and initial owner assignment to a registered user.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 4 - Instrument Details.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Physical Specs
slides.body: Property specifications: 100,000 m² area, 2015 build year, 500 units. Full physical asset data model captured before deployment — institutional-grade tokenization.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 4 - Instrument Details Form.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Pricing Valuation
slides.body: $100M property → 1,000,000 tokens at $100 each. Total valuation auto-calculated. Fractional tokenization makes institutional real estate accessible to more investors.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 5 - Pricing and Valuation.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Framework Selection
slides.body: One-click selection from 6 DALP Library templates: Japan FSA, MAS Singapore, MiCA EU (selected), Reg CF, Reg D 506(b). No custom compliance code required.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 6 - Compliance Modules.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Advanced Config
slides.body: Advanced configuration mode exposes extended wizard steps. Same global compliance library with MiCA selected — supports complex assets with longer setup flows.

slides.title: Compliance Identity Verification
slides.body: Boolean expression builder: KYC AND Asset classification. Visual expression construction with real-time validation. MiCA/EU examples provided as guidance.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Compliance Identity.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Complex Expression
slides.body: Nine-condition rule: KYC, AML, Qualified institutional investor, Accredited investor, NOT Asset location, Collateral, Prospectus filed, Issuer reporting. All enforced on-chain.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Compliance Expression.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Country Allowlist
slides.body: All 27 EU member states pre-populated from the MiCA template. Each country removable individually. Geographic investor restrictions enforced at smart contract level.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Compliance Country Allowlist.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Supply Limit MiCA
slides.body: MiCA supply cap: 8,000,000 tokens per 365-day rolling window. Base price conversion for EUR-denominated limits. Rolling window or fixed period selectable.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Supply Limit.jpg

slides.title: Asset Permissions Config Panel
slides.body: Fine-grained role assignment: Custodian, Governance, Emergency, Supply Manager, Sale Admin per wallet address. Administration and Operations clearly separated.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 7 - Asset Permissions Config.jpg

slides.title: Asset Permissions Roster
slides.body: Three-party governance: Ada Admin (Permission manager, Governance), Anna Schmidt (Custodian), Yuki Tanaka (5 roles: Custodian, Supply, Emergency, Sale admin, Funds).
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer - Step 7 - Asset Permissions List.jpg

slides.title: Permissions Full Governance
slides.body: Step 10/11: 5-party governance — System Admin, Asset Issuer, Emma Chen, Hans Mueller, Quinn Walker — each with distinct roles. Separation of duties before token deployment.

slides.title: Review Deploy Step One
slides.body: Complete summary at 11/11 steps: Gold Bond (GOLBON), ISIN US0378331005, France, 100,000 max supply. All parameters confirmed before blockchain deployment.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Review and Deploy 1.jpg

slides.title: Review Deploy Compliance
slides.body: Pre-deployment: 3 active compliance modules (SMART identity, Country allowlist, Token supply limit) and all 5 administrators with wallet addresses shown.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/03 - Asset Designer/Asset Designer Review and Deploy 2.jpg

slides.title: My Assets Portfolio View
slides.body: $276M across 7 instruments: real estate, stablecoin, deposit, equity, bond, precious metal, fund. Live balance, available, and frozen token tracking per asset.

slides.title: Asset Insights Platform Scale
slides.body: $13.17B AUM across 71 assets: 11 bonds, 10 equities, 10 funds, 10 stablecoins, 10 deposits, 10 real estates, 10 precious metals. Real-time value distribution.

slides.title: Portfolio Insights
slides.body: Multi-dimensional analytics: asset value by instrument, supply count by type, class distribution — three simultaneous views for complete portfolio composition.

slides.title: Portfolio Insights View Two
slides.body: Alternative portfolio insights from a different account perspective. Same three-chart layout: by instrument, supply, and class — consistent UX across user roles.

slides.title: Bonds
slides.body: Fixed income tokenization: multi-currency bond portfolio management.

slides.title: Bonds Portfolio Listing
slides.body: 10 bonds across 9 currencies (EUR, MYR, CAD, CHF, SAR, AED, SGD, JPY, GBP). Types: floating rate, zero coupon, convertible, high yield, green, corporate.

slides.title: Bond Detail Asset Data
slides.body: Municipal Bond Tokyo: 10 tabs, maturity Feb 2031, 100% redemption coverage, 3 holders, 1.1M supply. Cross-currency: AED price, MIZY denomination.

slides.title: Bond Detail Yield Schedule
slides.body: Automated 5-year annual coupon (2026–2031). Separate yield contract on-chain. 500,000 MIZY denomination reserve pre-funded. Yield rate 250 basis points.

slides.title: Bond Detail Audit Trail
slides.body: On-chain event log: Yield Schedule Set, Transfer Completed, Checkpoint Updated. Automatic checkpoints per transfer create a tamper-proof compliance audit trail.

slides.title: Bond Detail Issuer Verification
slides.body: SMART identity verification active on bond. IssuerLicensed topic captures License Type, Number, and Jurisdiction. Regulatory license attestation stored on-chain.

slides.title: Equity
slides.body: Tokenized equity across common, preferred, and voting share classes.

slides.title: Equity Share Portfolio
slides.body: 10 equities: common, preferred, voting share classes. EUR and USD pricing, 0 decimals (whole shares). Full corporate capital structure supported in one platform.

slides.title: Equity Detail Collateral
slides.body: Pacific Equity Common: 151.52% collateral coverage, $770M market cap. Over-collateralized with automatic minting capacity calculation and expiry tracking.

slides.title: Funds
slides.body: Tokenized funds from venture capital to emerging market strategies.

slides.title: Funds Portfolio Listing
slides.body: 10 funds with 18-decimal fractional precision: Sustainable Impact, Multi-Strategy, Venture Capital, Private Equity, Market Neutral, Emerging Markets. EUR/USD.

slides.title: Fund Detail Metadata
slides.body: Sustainable Impact Fund: Category (Emerging Markets), Class (Sector-Specific), Management fee. Asset-type-specific schema beyond standard token parameters.

slides.title: Fund Detail Verifications
slides.body: Four on-chain verifications: base price, asset issuer, contract identity, asset classification. All cryptographically attested via ONCHAINID — even basic attributes.

slides.title: Deposits and Stablecoins
slides.body: Tokenized bank deposits and multi-currency stablecoins for cash management.

slides.title: Deposits Bank Listing
slides.body: Tokenized bank deposits: UBS Swiss Deposit, DBS Singapore, Saudi Riyal, Emirates Dirham. Multi-currency cash equivalent management from institutional issuers.

slides.title: Stablecoins Multi Currency
slides.body: Full spectrum: USDC, USDT, EURS, AED, SGD, CAD, JPY stablecoins plus platform-native SettleMint Dollar. All 1:1 fiat-pegged, 18 decimals, all Active.

slides.title: Stablecoin SGD Peg Detail
slides.body: Singapore Dollar Coin (SGDC): peg currency stored on-chain as a verifiable attribute. 1:1 SGD peg explicitly configured — transparent digital fiat monetary policy.

slides.title: Precious Metals
slides.body: Gold, silver, platinum, palladium tokenized with real custody traceability.

slides.title: Precious Metals Vault Listing
slides.body: 10 tokens across gold, silver, platinum, palladium. Named after real vault locations (London, Zurich, Tokyo) and custodians (Brinks, Loomis). 18-decimal precision.

slides.title: Precious Metal Physical Link
slides.body: Brinks Gold Token (BGT): metal type, storage (London), custodian on-chain. $2B total market value. Physical custody attributes linked to the digital token.

slides.title: Real Estate
slides.body: Global property tokenization with GPS metadata and on-chain attestation.

slides.title: Real Estate Global Portfolio
slides.body: 10 properties: Bangkok, Berlin, Paris, Amsterdam, Dubai, Singapore, Tokyo, New York, Munich, Brussels. EUR/USD pricing, 0 decimals, all Active across jurisdictions.

slides.title: Real Estate Commercial View
slides.body: GBP, JPY, SGD portfolio: Manhattan Office Tower, London Warehouse, Tokyo Hotel, Dubai Marina, Riyadh Office. Full commercial real estate asset type coverage.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate Assets - Listing.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Brussels Property
slides.body: Brussels Central Apartments (BCAPT): $250M, 500 tokens at $500K each. Property type, use, city, district code, area ID stored on-chain. EU residential tokenization.

slides.title: Real Estate Doha Asset Detail
slides.body: Doha Business Towers: GPS (25.286106, 51.534817), REN identifier, 100,000 m², 500 units, 2015 build. $100M in 1M tokens at $100. Embedded map view.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Asset Details.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Data Feed
slides.body: On-chain data feed creation for Doha Towers. Asset-scoped numeric (scalar) feed registers price updates and valuation changes via the built-in feed registry.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Create Data Feed.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Event Log
slides.body: On-chain audit trail: every minting, transfer, and compliance change permanently recorded with timestamps and sender addresses — immutable compliance evidence.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Events.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Mint Tokens
slides.body: Token minting: recipient from registered users, amount entry, no supply limit for DBT. Two-step confirmation (VALUES → CONFIRM) before on-chain execution.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Mint Tokens.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate Mint Confirm
slides.body: Minting complete: Ada Admin selected, 5,000 DBT entered. Continue button activates on valid form — guides to blockchain execution confirmation step.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Mint Tokens Confirm.jpg

slides.title: Real Estate On-Chain Proof
slides.body: 8 active verifications for Doha Towers: GPS, property class, physical specs, REN, base price, asset issuer, contract identity — all attested via ONCHAINID.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/10 - Real Estate/Real Estate - Doha Business Towers - Verifications.jpg

slides.title: Compliance and Policy Templates
slides.body: Pre-built and custom regulatory frameworks for global asset issuance.

slides.title: Policy Templates Global Library
slides.body: 7 DALP Library frameworks: Japan FSA, MAS Singapore, MiCA EU, Reg CF, Reg D 506(b), Reg D 506(c), UK FCA. All Published and production-ready.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Compliance Policy Templates.jpg

slides.title: Policy MAS Singapore Detail
slides.body: MAS Capital Markets: 4 controls — SMART identity, Country allowlist, Investor count, Time lock. Holding period restriction aligns with MAS digital asset regulations.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Compliance Policy Detail 1.jpg

slides.title: Policy MiCA EU Standard
slides.body: MiCA EU: 3 controls - SMART identity, Country allowlist, 8M EUR rolling annual supply limit. MiCA Article 23 enforced on-chain with 365-day rolling window.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Compliance Policy Detail 2.jpg

slides.title: Policy Templates Custom Plus Library
slides.body: Org templates (Draft) alongside DALP Library (Published). Qatar Real Estate Token custom template with 5 controls — extensibility beyond the pre-built library.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Templates - List.jpg

slides.title: Policy Template Create New
slides.body: New template: name, jurisdiction (Qatar), description — created instantly as Draft. Ready for custom compliance controls to be configured and published.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Templates - Create From Scratch.jpg

slides.title: Policy Template Control Library
slides.body: 12 available controls across 7 categories: Eligibility, Restrictions, Transfer controls, Issuance and supply, Time-based rules, Settlement and collateral.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Qatar Real Estate Token - Overview.jpg

slides.title: Expression Builder Simple Rule
slides.body: Visual boolean builder: Accredited investor AND KYC. Real-time validation, AND/OR operators, color-coded pills. Intuitive compliance rule construction for any team.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Expression Builder.jpg

slides.title: Investor Count Country Limits
slides.body: Qatar investor count: 1,000,000 max, no global cap. Per-country limits enable precise regulatory compliance without blanket restrictions across all jurisdictions.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Investor Count Config.jpg

slides.title: Compliance Control Audit
slides.body: Disabling a compliance control requires confirmation and is permanently logged. Every change traceable — critical for regulated issuers and compliance audit requirements.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Investor Count Disable Dialog.jpg

slides.title: Supply Cap Control Detail
slides.body: Supply cap enforces maximum token supply at minting, prevents exceeding configured limit, supports regulatory supply restrictions. Single-click Enable action.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Supply Cap Detail.jpg

slides.title: Token Supply Limit Config
slides.body: 10M tokens per 30-day rolling window. Base price conversion for EUR-denominated limits, asset-level vs issuer-wide scoping. Granular time-windowed supply control.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Policy Template - Token Supply Limit Config.jpg

slides.title: Instrument Templates Library
slides.body: 5 pre-built templates: Bond (Maturity Redemption, Fixed Yield), Deposit, Fund (Voting Power, AUM Fee), Precious Metal, StableCoin. Custom variants built on top.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Instrument Templates - List and Create.jpg

slides.title: Instrument Template Add Field
slides.body: Metadata schema editor: field name, label, description, type (string/number/enum), mutability (immutable/restricted-mutable), required toggle, default value.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Instrument Template - Add Metadata Field.jpg

slides.title: Instrument Template Field Config
slides.body: City field: string type, restricted-mutable, optional. Field-level inspection via click-to-open panel. Template actions for publish, edit, and version management.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Instrument Template - Metadata Field City Config.jpg

slides.title: Qatar Real Estate Schema
slides.body: 6-field schema: city, latitude, longitude (restricted-mutable), propertyUse (immutable/enum), buildingYear, districtCode. Core classification locked; ops fields updatable.
slides.image_path: templates/dalp-screenshots/11 - Compliance and Policy Templates/Instrument Template - Qatar Real Estate - Metadata Schema.jpg

slides.title: Identity and Verification
slides.body: On-chain identity infrastructure and KYC/AML verification management.

slides.title: On-Chain Identity User View
slides.body: Personal identity contract: QR code, Registered status, country (BE), 2 active verifications. AML verification issued by System Admin via ONCHAINID standard.

slides.title: User Management Registry
slides.body: 11 registered participants: each with a blockchain wallet (EOA) and on-chain identity contract (ONCHAINID). User types: Investor and Trusted issuer.

slides.title: Verification Topics Registry
slides.body: System topics (AML, Accredited investor, Asset classification) alongside custom topics (assetCoordinates, assetPhysicalDetails). 21–30 total verification topics.

slides.title: XVP Settlement
slides.body: Atomic cross-chain exchange vs payment settlement with HTLC security.

slides.title: XVP Setup Asset Flows
slides.body: Step 1: Local flow from Quinn Walker to Emma Chen using Deutsche Bank Euro Deposit. Named participant selection with Enter manually fallback for direct address input.

slides.title: XVP Setup Settlement Config
slides.body: Settlement name, April 1 expiry, auto-execute, Belgium jurisdiction. HTLC security: hashlock entry for cross-chain atomic execution. Enter secret alternative available.

slides.title: XVP Setup Two-Leg Review
slides.body: Two-leg atomic trade: 100,000 DEED (Quinn → Emma, local) + 500 tokens (Emma → Hans, External Chain 1). All or nothing. Create settlement deploys on-chain.

slides.title: XVP Setup HTLC Details
slides.body: Full HTLC confirmation: hashlock (0x75657d...923ce) displayed, secret masked. Settlement name, expiry, auto-execute confirmed before blockchain deployment.

slides.title: XVP Details Pending State
slides.body: Settlement Pending: 0/1 approvals (Quinn Walker required). Hashlock visible, secret not yet revealed. Cross-chain responsibility warning shown. Awaiting counterparty.

slides.title: XVP Details Multi-Party Approval
slides.body: 0/2 approvals with 13-hour expiry warning. System Admin ↔ Asset Issuer swap Proof-of-Deposit tokens. Expiry urgency management built into the status view.

slides.title: XVP API Documentation
slides.body: Light-mode REST API docs for XvP settlement endpoints. Full programmatic access to settlement creation, approval, execution — integrates with OMS and trading systems.

slides.title: Settings and Administration
slides.body: API access, activity logging, addon modules, and white-label branding.

slides.title: Settings API Keys
slides.body: Named API keys displayed once at creation. Copy-to-clipboard, sm_atk_ prefix format. Keys cannot be retrieved again — enterprise-grade API security model.

slides.title: Settings Actions Queue
slides.body: 5 upcoming Claim yield actions for Sovereign Bond 2029: annual coupon payments 1–5 years out. Authorization-gated, Pending/Upcoming/Completed categorization.

slides.title: Activity Log Categorized Events
slides.body: Color-coded audit trail: Identity (blue), Access control (red), Assets (green), System (gray), Transfers (teal). Gasless transactions confirm permissioned blockchain.

slides.title: Activity Real-Time Feed
slides.body: Live activity: XvP creation, identity verification, compliance events, token transfers. Real gas costs and block numbers visible — confirms live blockchain operations.

slides.title: Settings Addon Modules
slides.body: 12+ modular addons as smart contracts: Permit (gasless), Fixed Yield Schedule, Maturity Redemption, XvP, Transaction Fee Accounting. Enable and expand without redeployment.

slides.title: Settings White-Label Branding
slides.body: Full white-label: logos for light/dark mode, 6 semantic color tokens, live UI preview. Any institution can brand DALP as their own platform — no code changes.

slides.title: Settings Login Branding
slides.body: White-label extends to authentication: favicon (Apple touch, SVG formats), login page background, logo, and welcome messaging fully customizable per institution.

slides.title: Tokenized Deposit Asset
slides.body: Deutsche Bank Euro Deposit (DEED) asset detail. 8-tab interface. The institutional-grade deposit token used as denomination currency across bonds and XvP settlements.

slides.title: Monitoring
slides.body: Enterprise-grade observability for API performance and blockchain health.

slides.title: API Monitoring Overview
slides.body: 694 requests in 24h, 1.2% error rate (4xx: 1.0%, 5xx: 0.1%), 916ms avg response. Real-time traffic chart updated every 35 seconds. No third-party tooling required.

slides.title: API Monitoring Request Log
slides.body: Per-request: caller identity, IP, headers, x-request-id for distributed tracing. SettleMint/2.1.7 version tracking. Cookie redaction. Full API observability built in.

slides.title: Blockchain Monitoring
slides.body: Chain RPC (Healthy, Block #18,173, head 17s) and Indexer (0 blocks behind) in real time. 24-hour health history with Healthy/Degraded/Warning state tracking.

slides.title: Insights
slides.body: Real-time portfolio analytics across all managed assets and classes.

slides.title: Asset Insights Full Overview
slides.body: $142.6M across 64 assets: 7 types, 2 pending launches. Three views: by instrument value, supply count, and asset class distribution — all updated in real time.
